title: This NEW Hermes Update Builds Agents From Scratch
summary: Hermes introduces a Blank Slate mode that lets users build AI agents from scratch by starting with minimal components and adding only necessary tools. This approach reduces bloat, prevents unwanted feature drift from updates, and simplifies agent configuration for lean use cases.
writeup: The video covers Hermes and its new Blank Slate mode, which builds AI agents from scratch by starting with minimal components and adding only the tools a given task requires. The approach matters because it reduces bloat, prevents unwanted feature drift introduced by updates, and simplifies configuration for lean use cases. The takeaway: minimal starting points keep agents focused and easier to maintain than feature-heavy defaults.
